allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command pg_dump -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Program Files'' -Recurse -Filter ''pg_dump.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName")
Bash(docker exec suples-db psql -U root -d suplementos -c "SELECT pg_size_pretty\(pg_database_size\(''suplementos''\)\) AS size;")
Bash(docker exec suples-db psql -U root -d suplementos -c "\\dx")
Bash(docker exec suples-db psql -U root -d suplementos -c "SELECT schemaname, matviewname FROM pg_matviews;")
Bash(docker exec suples-db psql -U root -d suplementos -c ":*)
